config_note: Knowledge tasks dispatch by explicit stage_key columns. Uvicorn web processes run with TASK_WORKER_AUTOSTART=0, and scripts/backend_watchdog.sh starts standalone task_worker_main processes. worker_process_slots caps the standalone worker process count unless TASK_WORKER_PROCESSES overrides it; each process hot-reloads this JSON every 5s. worker_lanes_per_process=10 with 20 slots gives 200 knowledge execution entrances. worker_total_memory_limit_mb=73728 lets the worker group use up to about 72GB RSS before watchdog restart. claim_lock_scope=database serializes only the short DB claim section across worker processes; task execution remains concurrent. lane_concurrency is the resource-pool budget: local_preprocess is local CPU/disk/conversion work, vision_analysis is VLM/OCR cloud vision work, llm_analysis is LLM fusion/profile/graph work, derived_index and relation_build are downstream DB work. dynamic_stage_concurrency redistributes a lane budget across only the active stages in that lane by fair share plus backlog weight. stage_dispatch_order chooses which node queue to drain first inside those resource constraints. Changing TASK_WORKER_PROCESSES, worker_process_slots, worker_total_memory_limit_mb, or DB pool env values requires backend restart.

model_auto_pause.error_message: QueuePool limit of size 8 overflow 1 reached, connection timed out, timeout 120.00 (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/3o7r)
